mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show negative mean or Rank IC < 0.02 over 12-month rolling windows when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated unemployment rates reflect deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer purchasing power, which suppresses corporate revenue growth and drives negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of observations when UNRATE exceeds 8.0%, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in retail sales exceeding 2.0% signals a sharp rebound in consumer demand, which immediately boosts earnings expectations and triggers positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are negative or flat in >70% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) after the initial recovery phase.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production breaking above its 2017 baseline index level confirms a sustained supply-side recovery, reducing recession fears and supporting positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain negative or exhibit Rank IC < 0.02 in 80% of periods following the threshold crossing.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising retail sales alongside falling unemployment creates a compounding positive earnings cycle, where stronger consumer spending outpaces labor market weakness, driving positive forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a negative or statistically insignificant coefficient in out-of-sample regressions, or forward returns are negative in >60% of joint-trigger cases.

mechanism_narrative: Near-zero policy rates combined with stable inflation expectations eliminate real yield compression risks, allowing liquidity-driven asset repricing to dominate and produce positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns turn negative when real yields (FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL growth) rise above 0.5%, or the interaction signal shows Rank IC < 0.01 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining nonfarm payrolls during a liquidity-driven market rally signals a fundamental divergence between asset prices and economic activity, which inevitably corrects and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20-day returns in >75% of instances when PAYEMS declines, or the signal fails to predict direction during confirmed liquidity expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated housing starts during a post-crisis policy accommodation phase signal sustained demand in interest-sensitive sectors, which drives positive broad market returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >65% of triggered periods, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below baseline when policy rates remain at the zero lower bound.
